name: Dinner Dilema Huevos Rancheros
recipeIngredient: 3 cups frozen pepper and onion mixture
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix avocado and salsa in a small bowl; set aside at room temperature.
2. Heat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Line two cookie sheets with foil.
3. Lightly coat both sides of tortillas with non-stick spray.
4. Bake on prepared sheets for 8-10 minutes, or until crisp. Remove to dinner plates.
5. Meanwhile, heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat; add frozen pepper mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes, or until thawed and soft. Drain.
6. Wipe skillet with paper towel. Lightly coat with non-stick cooking spray and place over medium heat. Add beaten eggs and scramble until cooked through but not dry.
7. Spoon eggs on tortillas; top with salsa, peppers, and the toppings.
Per Serving without toppings:
419 calories
20g protein
31g carbohydrates
3g fiber
24g fat (5g saturated)
531mg sodium
